title: Tomatillo Salsa Verde
steps: Heat a comal or cast iron skillet over medium-high.

Char tomatillos, serranos, onion, and garlic until blistered, 8脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聯12 minutes.
Peel garlic. Remove serrano stems (seeds optional for heat).
Blend everything with cilantro, lime juice, and salt until smooth.
Taste and adjust salt. Chill before serving.
notes: Roots in the foothills. Goes on everything 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 eggs, beans, tacos, rice.

title: Miso-Glazed Tofu

ingredients.item: extra-firm tofu, pressed and sliced 3/4-inch thick

steps: Press tofu under a weight for 20 minutes to expel water. Slice into slabs.
Whisk miso, mirin, sake, brown sugar, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
Coat tofu slabs with glaze. Marinate 15 minutes (or up to 24 hours).
Heat broiler. Line a sheet pan with foil and brush with oil.

Broil 6脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聯8 inches from heat for 8脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聯10 minutes until glaze caramelizes and edges char.
Garnish with scallion and sesame seeds. Serve over rice with steamed greens.
notes: Watch closely under the broiler 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 sugar burns fast. Reserve extra glaze for drizzling.

title: Red Lentil Dal
steps: Combine lentils, water, turmeric, and salt in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce to simmer.

Cook 15脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聯20 minutes, skimming foam, until lentils break down into a porridge.
While lentils cook, heat ghee in a skillet over medium. Toast cumin seeds 30 seconds.
Add onion; cook until golden, 8 minutes.
Add garlic, ginger, and serrano; cook 1 minute.
Stir in garam masala and cayenne. Add tomato; cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Stir tempered onion mixture into lentils. Simmer 5 minutes more.
Finish with cilantro and lime. Serve over basmati rice with naan.
notes: The tempering (tadka) at the end is what makes it. Don't skip it.

title: Banana Sweet Potato Real Food Fuel

ingredients.item: pureed roasted or steamed sweet potato

steps: Puree banana with sweet potato.
Add the salt and water and blend until smooth.
Add more water, 1 tablespoon at a time, to achieve desired texture.
Store up to 3 days in the fridge. Put in a flask or Ziploc bag for in-run whole-food fueling.
notes: Tired of overly sweet gels? A real-food endurance fuel for long runs and rides. Per serving (approx): 109 cal, 27g carbs, 311mg sodium, 514mg potassium.

title: Vegan Tiramisu

ingredients.item: raw cashews, soaked 4 hours or boiled 15 minutes
strong brewed espresso or coffee, cooled

steps: Preheat oven to 350脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗掳F (175脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗掳C). Line a 9x13 inch baking pan with parchment paper.
Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Add non-dairy milk, oil, and vanilla. Mix until just combined. Pour into prepared pan and spread evenly.
Bake 25-30 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely, then cut into ladyfinger-sized strips.
Make the mascarpone: Drain soaked cashews and blend with coconut cream, powdered sugar, lemon juice, and vanilla until completely smooth, scraping sides as needed.
Combine cooled espresso with coffee liqueur if using. Spread a thin layer of cashew mascarpone on the bottom of a 9x13 dish.
Quickly dip ladyfinger strips into espresso mixture (don't soak) and arrange in a single layer over the mascarpone. Spread half the remaining mascarpone over the ladyfingers.
Repeat with another layer of dipped ladyfingers and remaining mascarpone. Smooth the top.
Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight for best results. Dust generously with cocoa powder before serving.
notes: Overnight chilling yields the best texture, allowing the layers to meld together. For the smoothest mascarpone, use a high-speed blender. Store covered in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Plantain Nachos

ingredients.item: jalape脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗卤o, seeded and minced
pickled jalape脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗卤os

steps: Cut off the ends of the plantains and score the skin lengthwise. Peel and slice plantains into thin rounds, about 1/8 inch thick.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry plantain slices in batches until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate and season with salt.
Make the guacamole: Mash avocados in a bowl, then stir in red onion, cilantro, lime juice, and salt.
Make the pico de gallo: Combine tomatoes, white onion, jalape脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗卤o, cilantro, lime juice, and salt in a bowl.
Arrange fried plantain chips on a large platter or baking sheet. Top with black beans and shredded cheese.
If desired, broil for 1-2 minutes until cheese is melted.
Top with guacamole, pico de gallo, sour cream, and pickled jalape脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗卤os. Serve immediately.
notes: Use green (unripe) plantains for the best texture脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰they're starchy and sturdy, not sweet. Yellow plantains will be too soft and caramelize. The plantain chips stay crisp much longer than tortilla chips, making these ideal for parties.

title: Indian Mexican Rice

ingredients.item: cooked black beans or kidney beans

steps: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic and onions, stirring for 4-5 minutes until soft.
Add cumin, oregano, and chili powder. Cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add rice, corn, beans, tomatoes, salt, and water. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 8-10 minutes until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Fluff with a fork and serve.
notes: Recipe adapted from Monica Bhide's cookbook 'Modern Spice'. Adding oregano and cumin gives a stronger Mexican flavor. Use tomato puree for extra zing if your tomatoes are on the sweeter side.

title: Sticky Teriyaki Chickpeas
steps: Whisk together soy sauce, water, brown sugar, seasoned rice vinegar, ginger, and garlic in a medium bowl. Set aside.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add drained chickpeas and sprinkle with onion powder, garlic powder, and salt. Stir and pan-fry until chickpeas are lightly golden, about 5 minutes.
Pour the teriyaki sauce over the chickpeas and bring to a simmer. Stir in the cornstarch slurry and cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and coats the chickpeas, about 2 minutes.
Serve warm teriyaki chickpeas over cooked rice with your choice of toppings.
notes: Great toppings include steamed broccoli, edamame, shredded carrots, snap peas, mango, pineapple, green onions, sesame seeds, or bok choy. For gluten-free, substitute tamari for soy sauce. Double the sauce recipe for extra to use on stir-fries or noodles.

title: Spicy Sesame Ramen Noodles
steps: Bring 6 cups of water to a boil. Add the ramen noodles and cook for 4脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聯5 minutes. When there are 2 minutes remaining, add the edamame to the boiling water. Drain and transfer to a large bowl.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat, add the oil and spinach and cook until the spinach is just wilted.
In a small bowl, whisk together tahini, rice vinegar, soy sauce, and honey until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
Toss the drained noodles and edamame with the grated carrots, wilted spinach, cilantro, and scallions. Pour the tahini sauce over and toss to coat.
Divide among bowls and top each serving with 2 teaspoons chili crisp.
notes: Chili crisp can be made ahead: heat vegetable oil with garlic, cinnamon stick, and star anise until fragrant, then stir in ginger, red pepper flakes, sugar, and salt. Let cool and store in a jar. Reserve some noodle cooking water to thin the sauce if needed.
